content.text:
# Top 100 Tech Categories

## Software & Applications
1. Operating Systems
2. Web Browsers
3. Productivity Software
4. Database Management Systems
5. Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP)
6. Customer Relationship Management (CRM)
7. Content Management Systems (CMS)
8. Project Management Tools
9. Video Conferencing Software
10. Office Suites

13. Natural Language Processing
14. Computer Vision
15. Generative AI
16. Predictive Analytics
17. Big Data Analytics
18. Data Visualization
19. Business Intelligence
20. Data Mining

22. Infrastructure as a Service (IaaS)

24. Software as a Service (SaaS)
25. Edge Computing
26. Serverless Computing
27. Virtualization
28. Containerization
29. Content Delivery Networks (CDN)
30. Cloud Storage

34. Encryption
35. Threat Intelligence
36. Penetration Testing
37. Antivirus/Antimalware

67. 3D Printing
68. Sensors & Actuators

73. Cryptocurrency
74. Augmented Reality (AR)
75. Virtual Reality (VR)
76. Mixed Reality
77. Metaverse
78. Digital Twins
79. Nanotechnology

## Networking & Communications

84. Telecommunications

## Development & Operations
91. DevOps

---

Would you like me to **expand on any specific category**, provide **examples of tools/companies** in each, or **reorganize** this list by a different criteria (e.g., by market size, growth rate, or industry application)?
